article.title: Seth Troxler: A Distinctive Voice in Modern Techno
article.subtitle: Detroit Roots and Berlin Influence Shape a Rising Talent
article.author: A. Stern
article.excerpt: Seth Troxler, at only 22, has already made significant inroads in the techno scene. His Detroit roots and recent move to Berlin have positioned him as a distinctive voice in modern electronic music.

content.text: Seth Troxler, at only 22, has already made significant inroads in the techno scene. His Detroit roots and recent move to Berlin have positioned him as a distinctive voice in modern electronic music.
Troxler's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. These elements contribute to his distinctive techno sound.

With releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, Troxler's work has been widely played and recognized. His recent releases include This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps.
Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age, and his relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.
